items.title: Allianz Life data breach affects 1.1 million customers
items.description: Data breach notification site Have I Been Pwned notified 1.1 million customers of a July data breach, a number not previously reported.

items.title: DA Davidson Lifts Salesforce (CRM) to Neutral, Keeps $225 PT
items.description: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the Buzzing AI Stocks on Wall Street. On August 15, DA Davidson upgraded the stock to Neutral from Underperform with an unchanged price target of $225. According to the firm, declining investor sentiment is appropriate for a business whose organic growth in its core is decelerating along with mounting competitive […]

items.title: Salesforce AI Agent Adoption Hits a Hurdle. Customers Have ‘Decision Fatigue,’ Analyst Says.
items.description: A Jefferies analyst cited conversations with several Salesforce partners who said sales pipelines have deteriorated in recent months due to declining interest

items.title: Can ServiceNow's Expanding AI-Powered Platform Drive the Stock Higher?
items.description: NOW grows AI-driven revenues with NVIDIA and Logik.ai support, but execution risks and valuation spark caution.

items.title: AppLovin Stock Skyrockets 20% in a Month: Should You Board the Train?
items.description: APP's Axon 2 fuels ad spend surge, revenue jumps 77%, and profits soar, driving a 20% stock rally with bullish growth forecasts.
